query: What are the side effects of ibuprofen?

retrievedChunks.text: Common side effects of ibuprofen include stomach pain, heartburn, and nausea.
Ibuprofen may cause dizziness and headache in some patients.
Consult your doctor before taking ibuprofen if you have kidney problems.
Aspirin is a different NSAID with its own side effect profile.
Do not exceed 1200mg of ibuprofen daily without medical supervision.

finalAnswer: Ibuprofen can cause stomach pain, heartburn, and nausea.
